feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Useful resources for ML PhD students

link.title: Useful resources for ML PhD students

entry.content:
A collection of resources I’ve found useful during my ML PhD. If you’re starting out or deep in the weeds, hopefully something here saves you some time.

Getting Started & General Advice

  • Just Know Stuff: A Guide to an ML PhD — Singlehandedly saved my PhD. If I had paid 100% more time doing what it said, it would not have been wasted.

  • How to ML Rebuttal — Practical guidance on writing effective ML paper rebuttals.

Courses & Lectures

  • General ML Overview (YouTube Playlist) — A solid video lecture series covering core ML topics at a very high level.

Books

  • Probabilistic Machine Learning: Advanced Topics — Comprehensive reference on advanced probabilistic ML.

  • Bayesian Computation Book — A good overview of Bayesian methods and computation (Online book).

  • Causal Inference for the Brave and True — Online book and hands-on Python-based overview to causal inference.
entry.summary: A collection of helpful links and references
